faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Cricket control services in Longwood typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and whether you need ongoing prevention. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: Why are crickets common in Longwood buildings?
faqs.answer: Longwood's mix of older apartment buildings, basements, and ground-level commercial spaces provides crickets with moisture, warmth, and hiding spots. Cracks in foundations, gaps around windows, and humid conditions in basements attract crickets, especially field crickets and house crickets seeking shelter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Longwood homes and businesses are resolved within 1-2 treatments. Our technicians use targeted insecticides, exclusion techniques, and habitat modification to eliminate active crickets and prevent new ones from entering. You'll typically notice a significant reduction within 24-48 hours of treatment.

faqs.question: Are cricket control treatments safe for Longwood families and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and pet-safe application methods suitable for Longwood's residential buildings and family homes. Our technicians take extra precautions in apartments and multi-family dwellings, and we offer eco-friendly treatment options upon request. Residents can safely return to treated areas once products have dried, typically within 2-4 hours.
